summary: Plan-only assessment: #92892 is the sole open, non-security PR candidate and is small/focused with maintainer_can_modify=true, but it is not merge-ready because the artifact lacks a complete merge preflight: checks failed to hydrate due a GraphQL rate-limit error, comments/review-bot comments were not hydrated, and no Codex /review proof is present. Recommend a contributor-branch repair/finalization path rather than merge or human escalation.

actions.reason: Keep #92892 as the canonical contributor PR for this one-item shard, but require repair/finalization before any merge recommendation.
Create an executable repair/finalization artifact for the applicator to refresh the contributor branch, hydrate/resolve comments and bot findings, run review and validation, then decide merge.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/finalize contributor PR #92892 on its editable branch, preserving YonganZhang's authorship and attribution. The executor should refresh against current main, inspect any human/bot comments, run Codex /review, address findings narrowly in the gateway image-support logic/tests if needed, then validate before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): allow Gemini CLI image-capable models
repair_candidate.pr_body: Finalize contributor PR #92892 for the Gemini CLI image-capability gate fix. Preserve @YonganZhang's source PR attribution, refresh against current main, address any hydrated human or review-bot findings, run Codex /review, and validate with the focused gateway test plus pnpm check:changed before merge.
credit_notes: Contributor credit: @YonganZhang authored the original fix and should retain attribution if the branch is repaired or if a replacement is later required.
